title: Under Roman Abramovich, Chelsea Broke Rules for Years, Premier League Says
summary_full: The Russian oligarch spent nearly two decades building the London soccer club into a sporting superpower. That success was built partly on regulation breaches, an investigation found.
summary_public: The Russian oligarch spent nearly two decades building the London soccer club into a sporting superpower. That success was built partly on regulation breaches, an investigation found.
